TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Laidazuan (malavi, 潭南部落) ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 227 buwan, 782 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 757 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 94%, Setik 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Laidazuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Laidazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Laidazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Laidazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Laidazuan hya' ga Tamazuan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lai*azuan (mala*i, ****) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, s~ɕetik *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa tamazuan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Laidazuan (malavi, 潭南部落) ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 227 buwan, 782 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 97% kyan ku 757 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 3% kyan ku 25 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 94%, Setik 1%, Amis 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Laidazuan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Laidazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Laidazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Laidazuan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Laidazuan hya' ga Tamazuan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lai*azuan (mala*i, ****) ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, s~ɕetik *%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lai*azuan ħjaʔ ɣa tamazuan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
